# Platform Notes: Meta Ads

## Best uses

- Advantage+ creative
- Broad discovery
- Retargeting
- Visual problem/outcome ads

## Agent rules

- Test hooks and visuals aggressively
- Use proof sequences in retargeting
- Do not rely only on primary text; creative concept matters

## Required campaign artifact sections

- Objective
- Buyer state
- Tactic
- Offer
- Creative/copy variants
- Landing page
- Metrics
- Launch notes
- Learning update path
